subject: Project Management
title: The Future of Flow
description: A micro-lesson that makes The Future of Flow usable.

hook.text: AI can now predict bottlenecks before they form — analyzing flow data in real time.

buildup.text: Machine learning spots patterns humans miss: which items will block, which will sail through.

discovery.text: Predictive flow management could make reactive problem-solving obsolete.

twist.text: But flow still depends on humans talking, trusting, and collaborating. AI can't fix culture.

climax.text: The future of Kanban is AI-enhanced flow — but the human element remains irreplaceable.

quiz.question: How might AI enhance Kanban in the future?
options: By predicting bottlenecks before they form
By eliminating the need for teams
By replacing all Kanban boards with chatbots
